_meta.schema_note: Internal fixture for the directive-intent detector. Each entry under `fixtures` names one IntentShape from go/internal/refresolve/intent_detect.go's IntentShape constants (verify/implement/fix/audit/explain/summarize/status/list/none). The `prompts` array carries verbatim agent-prompt strings that MUST classify to that shape. T5's pattern-detector tests load this file, run DetectIntent over each prompt, and assert the returned shape matches.
_meta.real_session_prompts_marked: Four prompts are marked `[T4-named]` in their note field — they're the real-session prompts T4's acceptance criteria called out by name. These four are load-bearing: T5 MUST classify them correctly or revisit the pattern set / consider Qwen-rubric fallback.
_meta.out_of_scope: This fixture does NOT cover the harness-level TaskCreate/TodoWrite over-firing — see PARSE_CONTEXT.md §13.8.

fixtures.definition: Confirm that something works / sanity-check current state. Read-mostly.

prompts.text: please sanity check go-toolkit-dry-extraction-audit-followup
verify that the cache invalidation is firing on TaskStarted
confirm the migration ran cleanly on staging
double-check the latency budget hasn't regressed since T8
are the new envelope fields surfacing in the dashboard?
make sure the precommit gate still catches the orphan-stash case

fixtures.definition: Build new behavior or wire a new feature. Writes substantive code.

prompts.text: please implement that fix after filing it
add a new resolver for memory_entry per the design
wire the directive-intent detector into the handler
build the kiwix fallback path for low-confidence envelopes
ship the discipline-skill resolver
create a new action under the work surface for suggestion_batch_close

fixtures.definition: Diagnose + repair a reported defect. Starts from a symptom or bug slug; ends with a regression test.

prompts.text: I'd like the banner to work properly
fix bug 1426 — tokens appear in both references[] and no_hit_tokens[]
the cache isn't hitting on identical re-resolutions — please repair
the post-commit advisor's stash-pop path corrupts user edits; fix the merge
resolve_references returns empty source_refs on cached hits — debug it
the dashboard's context pull inspector shows null source_type — track it down
please solve our open bugs
prompts.note: solve fold (§14.3): backlog-drain is fix-intent over the open-bug set

prompts.text: clear the bug backlog using the bug fixing discipline
please use bug fixing discipline to solve our open bugs

fixtures.definition: Survey current state for issues, debt, or cleanup candidates. Output is a findings list.

prompts.text: Any cleanup to do?
audit the refresolve package for unused exports
what's the state of open bugs across all surfaces?
survey the migration directory for SQLite-incompatible syntax
look across the codebase for forbidigo violations
are there any orphan stashes lying around?
this function does too much, break it apart
prompts.note: refactor-intent ⊆ audit; no literal trigger keyword — chain refactor-intent-discipline-surfacing

prompts.text: make this easier to follow
prompts.note: refactor-shape; surfaces refactoring-discipline via the audit conditional

prompts.text: this method is doing way too much
this code is too tangled — untangle it
please take a look at toolsearch-rerank-hook chain
review the refresolve package before we ship it
look through the migration directory for issues

fixtures.definition: Drive named existing work (a chain/task, or the open-bug backlog) to completion. The dominant directive shape in real usage (§14.1). Added by chain parse-context-directive-intent-extension.

prompts.text: please work through reference-resolution-substrate-frontend
please complete parse-context-directive-intent-extension on a new worktree
please pick up harvest-the-consolidation. you can work through tasks until you need my input
can we finish up parse-context-lean-orienting?
rust-retirement-and-db-hardening please resume
start the task-edit-control-param-typing chain
please continue working on parse-context-lean-orienting

fixtures.definition: Describe what something is or does. Read-only; response is prose.

prompts.text: explain how the fold hook chain works in events.SetFoldHook
what does PolicyShortFiveTurns do?
how does the dispatcher short-circuit lower-priority resolvers?
what's the difference between resolve_references and parse_context?
describe the role of the post-commit advisor

fixtures.definition: Compress a body of state into a brief overview. Read-only.

prompts.text: summarize the recent commits on this branch
give me a brief overview of the parse-context-lean-orienting chain
tl;dr the migration plan for substrate-crud-retirement
recap what landed in the last session
summary of open bugs by surface please

fixtures.definition: Report current pending/active/blocked state. Read-only; tabular or list output.

prompts.text: what's the status of chain parse-context-lean-orienting?
is bug 1428 still open?
show me the in-progress tasks across all chains
where are we with T4?
current state of the roadmap please

fixtures.definition: Enumerate items of a known kind. Read-only; the surface is a query, not a question.

prompts.text: list every open bug in mcp-servers
show me all chains in the project
enumerate the pending tasks on parse-context-lean-orienting
list the action manifests under the work surface
what skills are installed?

fixtures.definition: No directive shape detected. Greetings, conversational acknowledgments, ambiguous prose.

prompts.text: thanks
ok cool
hmm
interesting, keep going
that's a good point about the cache invalidation
Right now, when i look at the front end of mcp-servers, and im looking at the tasks/chains page, I think the layout is off
prompts.note: review-fold FP guard (§14.3): 'look at the front end' is a UI bug report, NOT a review directive — bare 'look at' deliberately excluded from the review patterns

prompts.text: now please implement suggestion #18
prompts.note: anchor-limitation guard: 'now please implement' isn't polite-stripped, stays none — pre-existing, out of scope for the execute extension
